name: coTfsTPDOGetDataByEventTimer
title: coTfsTPDOGetDataByEventTimer
syntax: long coTfsTPDOGetDataByEventTimer( dword index, dword outLength[], byte outValueBuf[], dword valueBufSize );
description: This function reads the TPDO data via an event timer mechanism.
The test was successful if all parts of the tests are executed successfully. If that's the case, the TPDO data are written in outLength[] and outValueBuf[]. Otherwise the data are set invalid.
The parameters outLength[] and outValueBuf[] can be omitted both.

parameters.name: outLength[]
parameters.description: Size of the TPDO in bytes.

parameters.name: outValueBuf[]
parameters.description: Data of the TPDO, the array size should be 8 bytes.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
